name: M4A1消音版 | 骑士
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has brass inlays with a renaissance armor theme. What do you mean you can't find Cocinero and Izaki? - Felix Riley, Commanding Officer
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器使用文艺复兴时期的铠甲主题图案，以黄铜进行了镶嵌。 你说你找不到库西内罗和伊崎是什么意思？- 指挥官费利克斯.莱利
